top3.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'DC')) -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel')) AS difference

SELECT 
    ABS(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'DC Comics')) 
        - 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'))
    ) AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'DC')) -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel')) AS difference

SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC' THEN 1 END) -
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC', 'Marvel');

SELECT 
    ABS(
        COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 END) 
        - 
        COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END)
    ) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'DC')) -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel')) AS difference

SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC' THEN 1 END) -
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC', 'Marvel');

SELECT 
    ABS(
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        - 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    ) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

final.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'DC')) -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel')) AS difference
